hook.summary: A woman dances happily while a PayPal balance overlay rapidly increases from $723 to over $900.
hook.visual_action: UGC-style video of a woman in a blue hoodie smiling and dancing, paired with a dynamic PayPal wallet UI showing rising funds.
hook.text_overlay: POV: Playing Solitaire Clash won't make you a millionaire, but it can help you pay your bills. I can win up to $200 a day. 🥰🥳
hook.voiceover_transcript: You're a champion bitch, there you go

scene_flow: UGC creator dances as a PayPal balance counter ticks up rapidly in the corner.
The balance hits $907.00 and a transaction confirmation for a PayPal card appears.
Final screen shows a PayPal balance summary with confetti and a 'Win Cash' button.
on_screen_text: skill-based real cash game. Winnings depend on your skills.
POV: Playing Solitaire Clash won't make you a millionaire, but it can help you pay your bills. I can win up to $200 a day. 🥰🥳
This skill-based game is for players 18+. Actual prizes and gameplay may vary by rules and performance. Top-ups are available, but not required.
audience_proxy: Young adults and gig workers looking for easy ways to supplement their income through mobile games.
